title: centunculus pentandrus var. linum-stellatum
intro: Centunculus pentandrus var. linum-stellatum, also known as Starflower or Stellaria, is a perennial herb belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Centunculus pentandrus var. linum-stellatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
